languages.text: {n}Вокс-динамики обоих техножрецов издают краткую бинарную арию в знак окончания разговора. Паскаль и Эоганн стремительно удаляются, избегая любых взаимодействий друг с другом.{/n}
{n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вокс-динамики обоих техножрецов издают краткую бинарную арию в знак окончания разговора. Паскаль и Эоганн стремительно удаляются, избегая любых взаимодействий друг с другом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit a brief binary aria, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}

{n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Vox-Sender beider Techpriester zeigen mit kurzen binhärischen Arien das Ender der Unterhaltung an. Pasqal und Eogunn ziehen sich rasch zurück, ohne miteinander zu interagieren.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Vox-Sender beider Techpriester zeigen mit kurzen binhärischen Arien das Ender der Unterhaltung an. Pasqal und Eogunn ziehen sich rasch zurück, ohne miteinander zu interagieren.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les émetteurs-vox des deux technoprêtres émettent de brèves mélodies en binhaire, marquant la fin de la conversation. Pasqal et Eogunn s'éloignent rapidement, en évitant soigneusement tout contact.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les émetteurs-vox des deux technoprêtres émettent de brèves mélodies en binhaire, marquant la fin de la conversation. Pasqal et Eogunn s'éloignent rapidement, en évitant soigneusement tout contact.{/n}

languages.text: {n}两位技术神甫的音阵发射器传出简短的二进制咏叹，标志着谈话结束。帕斯卡和伊奥贡迅速离去，互相避之不及。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}两位技术神甫的音阵发射器传出简短的二进制咏叹，标志着谈话结束。帕斯卡和伊奥贡迅速离去，互相避之不及。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los vocos emisores de ambos tecnosacerdotes emiten breves arias en binario indicando el fin de la conversación. Pasqal y Eogunn se marchan rápidamente, evitando interactuar entre ellos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los vocos emisores de ambos tecnosacerdotes emiten breves arias en binario indicando el fin de la conversación. Pasqal y Eogunn se marchan rápidamente, evitando interactuar entre ellos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}テックプリースト2人のヴォックスエミッターが短いビンハリ語のアリアを発し、会話の終わりを告げる。パスカルとエオグンは、互いの交流を避けながら足早に去っていく。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-emitters on both Tech-Priests emit brief binharic arias, signifying the end of the conversation. Pasqal and Eogunn depart swiftly, avoiding any interaction with one another.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Her iki Tekno Rahibin voksyayarları, konuşmanın sona erdiğini belirten kısa ikilidil sesler yayıyor. Pasqal ve Eogunn, birbirleriyle herhangi bir etkileşimden kaçınarak hızla ayrılıyor.{/n}
